programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E92 - Road Trip'. Mum helps Bluey and Bingo find ways to entertain themselves on a family road trip, while Dad tries to stay ahead of the grey nomad convoy or risk camping near the toilets.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E84 - Ice Cream'. Bluey and Bingo want a lick of each other's ice cream. But they are so focused on making sure each lick is fair, they don't notice their ice creams are melting.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E93 - Dunny'. Mum bans the girls from saying the word 'dunny' because it's not a word the Queen of England would use, but the kids try and trick her into saying it anyway.

programme.title: Dog Squad
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Mission: Train Station'. Kika is a golden Labrador and guide dog for her owner Dr Amit, who is blind. She is trained to use her supersight to help him do as many things as he can by himself. Together, they make the best team!

programme.title: Andy's Global Adventures
programme.desc: 'S1/E21 - Andy and the European Hamster'. Andy, Jen and Scout head off on a global adventure to Vienna, Austria, in search of European hamsters. The team discover that wild hamsters have a taste for flowers and candle wax.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E40 - Early Baby'. Bluey's playgroup is at odds when Indy's baby hospital collides with Rusty's knights and dragons. But in explaining themselves, they both find that their games actually have a lot in common.

programme.title: Supertato
programme.desc: 'S1/E45'. Supertato and Carrot are looking for ice and think Evil Pea has become kind by giving them some. They soon realise it's not Evil Pea after all.

programme.title: Swashbuckle
programme.desc: 'S8/E3 - Captain Captain's Aarrrt Show'. In this episode Captain Captain takes up painting and is convinced she is a talented artist. She decides to put on an arrrt show of her work in the cove.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E25 - Taxi'. Bluey is running a taxi service. Her first passenger is Businessman Dad, who is in a rush to get to the airport. But with unexpected delays, Dad's in danger of missing his flight!

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E75 - Mum School'. Bluey plays mum to a brood of bouncy balloons, including an irrepressible floater named Greenie. But she soon discovers that mothering is much harder than she imagined.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E65 - Trains'. All aboard the Dad Train! Bingo goes from home to daycare to her job at the vet every morning, but there's trouble on the line as a mischievous Bluey throws everyone off schedule.

programme.title: Pop Paper City
programme.desc: 'S1/E22 - Downhill Racers'. It's the annual go-kart race, and Zip has chosen the racecourse, but is worried it isn't as fun as the ones before, so he tries to make the racecourse more exciting.

programme.title: Swashbuckle
programme.desc: 'S2/E20 - Raspberry Fools'. Ihsaan, Yusuf, Noor and Jannat play a variety of games including Stepping Stones and Coconutty Raft to try and win back Gem's jewels.

programme.title: Swashbuckle
programme.desc: 'S6/E8 - Green Fingered Pirates'. Cook and Line give Captain HeyHo a new plant, Keith. The captain suggests that by playing calming music they could help their new plant grow.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E68 - Army'. Jack is the new dog at school and the newest recruit in Rusty's Army. Jack struggles with following instructions and always forgets his hat, but Rusty will make a soldier of him yet.

programme.title: Twirlywoos

programme.desc: 'S3/E61 - The Harmattan'. The Harmattan, a powerful dust storm, traps the Guard and Makucha's leopards. Ono uses his knowledge of the Harmattan to send Makucha and cronies into a whirlwind.

programme.title: The Lion Guard
programme.desc: 'S3/E62 - Ghost of the Mountain'. The Lion Guard must protect a pack of Red Pandas from the Ghost of the Mountain when they claim Bunga as their Chosen One.

programme.title: Superkitties
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - The Superkitties and the Fireworks Fright/The Superkitties and the Cheese Trees'. Mr Puppypaws steals all of Kittydale's fireworks. The SuperKitties have to stop Lab Rat from turning Kittydale into cheese.

programme.title: Pupstruction
programme.desc: 'S1/E12 - Professor Frazzle/A Crabby Neighbor'. Professor Frazzle keeps wrecking her lab with explosive experiments. Underwater, Pupstruction helps separate a cranky crab and his neighbor by building a wall between their houses.

programme.title: Pupstruction
programme.desc: 'S1/E13 - Home Stinky Home'. Phinny and the crew work to give Bailey some snowy fun on a warm summer day. Pupstruction builds a tower tall enough to see over the clouds by thinking outside the box.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S3/E134 - Granny Mobile'. Muffin is playing Grouchy Granny at a garage sale, making Dad push her on an old mobility scooter. But when a real Grouchy Granny wants to buy it, Muffin won't budge.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S3/E135 - Space'. Mackenzie, Jack and Rusty are playing astronauts on a mission to Mars. But during their journey, Mackenzie keeps going missing and no one knows why - not even Mackenzie!

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S3/E136 - Cubby'. Bluey and Bingo build a very special cubby for their stuffed toy Kimjim.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S3/E137 - Musical Statues'. At the end of a long day, Bluey and her family are out of sync and out of sorts, so Mum gets everyone to play musical statues.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S3/E138 - Stories'. Indy thinks she's no good because her model horse looks like a cow, but Calypso encourages her not to give up, so she tries to fix it with a little help from Winton.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S3/E139 - Puppets'. Bluey and Bingo teach Unicorse good manners so he can ask Mum on a date, but things go awry when Unicorse eats a tick.

programme.title: Superkitties
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - The Superkitties and the Missing Mr. Greenie/ the Superkitties and the Piano Problem'. Mr. Puppypaws steals Bitsy's favorite toy, Mr. Greenie. The SuperKitties must return a grand piano to Petcini, after Cat Burglar steals it.

programme.title: Sofia The First
programme.desc: 'S2/E45 - The Leafsong Festival'. Crackle gives up her ability to breathe fire to sing in the Leafsong Festival. Sofia teaches her to take pride in what makes her special instead of trying to change it.

programme.title: Sofia The First
programme.desc: 'S2/E46 - Substitute Cedric'. Cedric steps in as substitute teacher for Sofia's sorcery class and helps the students of Royal Prep protect their school after a group of visiting pranksters arrive to wreak havoc.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S3/E119 - Phones'. Bluey and Bingo want to play restaurant with Grandad, but it's a little different than he's used to... he's going to need an app to order the food!

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S3/E120 - Pavlova'. The kids play Café so Bingo can eat Pavlova, but Dad the chef never seems to get the order quite right! When Bluey fires him, Dad sets up his own competing shop next door.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S3/E121 - Rain'. When a heavy summer rain thunders over the Heeler home, Bluey is determined to dam the water in the front yard, while Mum tries to stop her constantly tracking mud into the house.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S3/E122 - Pizza Girls'. Bluey and Bingo are making mud pizzas and delivering them to the grownups, but their pedal car's wheel keeps falling off!

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S3/E123 - Driving'. With only five minutes to play 'Driving,' Bluey and Mum race against the clock to buy milk for a grumpy guest and have to escape an angry shopkeeper.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S3/E124 - Tina'. Tired of being told what to do, Bluey and Bingo enlist their giant invisible friend to show Mum and Dad who's boss. Now they can do anything they want, until Mum and Dad rebel.

programme.title: Superkitties

programme.title: World's Most Scenic Railway Journeys
programme.desc: 'S3/E2 - Italy Genoa'. In the Italian province of Liguria, a journey along the Mediterranean's most spectacular stretch of coastline into the Apennine Mountains aboard a lovingly restored vintage train.

programme.title: Big Little Journeys
programme.desc: 'S1/E1'. In Canada, a tiny turtle ventures through a forest of giants in search of the wetland, and in South Africa, a bushbaby is drawn towards a world of light in his quest to find a home.

programme.title: Big Little Journeys
programme.desc: 'S1/E2'. A Taiwanese pangolin travels through a land of giants to seek a mate, and in Brazil, a family of tamarins travel to the edge of their world to seek a new future alongside humans.

programme.title: Where The Wild Men Are With Ben Fogle
programme.desc: 'S9/E2 - Ireland'. Ben ventures to the 'Emerald Isle' to visit Georg and Bettina, an elderly couple from Austria and Germany who made the Irish wilderness their home nearly 40 years ago.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: 'S10/E7 - Burdens of Winter'. As the Arctic summer turns to fall and temperatures begin their decline, bush-dwellers prepare for the winter ahead and face dangerous encounters with hungry predators.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: 'S5/E14 - Falkirk Wheel'. In this episode, an impossibly huge project in China to divert water from the wet south to the bone-dry north - the total length is the same distance as New York to Los Angeles.

programme.title: World's Most Scenic Railway Journeys
programme.desc: 'S3/E2 - Italy Genoa'. In the Italian province of Liguria, a journey along the Mediterranean's most spectacular stretch of coastline into the Apennine Mountains aboard a lovingly restored vintage train.

programme.title: Forces Of Nature
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Shape'. This episode explains how the perfect hexagonal honeycombs made by bees conceal a mathematical rule. Also, even the most delicate six-sided snowflake tells an extraordinary story.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: 'S5/E13 - 111 W57th Street'. In this episode, the skinniest skyscraper on earth is being built in New York - can engineers find a way to build this ultra-tall slender building?

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: 'S7/E10 - Ultimate Sacrifice'. Sue goes ptarmigan hunting. Andy and Denise battle jumble ice. Jessie races in the Iditarod.

programme.title: Where The Wild Men Are With Ben Fogle
programme.desc: 'S3/E5 - Laos'. Ben travels to Southeast Asia to meet 31-year-old Jon Watkinson, who quit a career in finance for life in a handmade bamboo hut on a remote island on the Mekong River in Laos.

programme.title: World's Most Scenic Railway Journeys
programme.desc: 'S3/E2 - Italy Genoa'. In the Italian province of Liguria, a journey along the Mediterranean's most spectacular stretch of coastline into the Apennine Mountains aboard a lovingly restored vintage train.

programme.title: Big Little Journeys
programme.desc: 'S1/E2'. A Taiwanese pangolin travels through a land of giants to seek a mate, and in Brazil, a family of tamarins travel to the edge of their world to seek a new future alongside humans.

programme.title: Where The Wild Men Are With Ben Fogle
programme.desc: 'S9/E2 - Ireland'. Ben ventures to the 'Emerald Isle' to visit Georg and Bettina, an elderly couple from Austria and Germany who made the Irish wilderness their home nearly 40 years ago.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: 'S10/E7 - Burdens of Winter'. As the Arctic summer turns to fall and temperatures begin their decline, bush-dwellers prepare for the winter ahead and face dangerous encounters with hungry predators.

programme.title: Ancient Egypt By Train
programme.desc: 'S1/E2'. Alice arrives in Cairo by train with a book she first read as a youth: A Thousand Miles Up the Nile by Victorian Egyptologist Amelia Edwards. Alice follows Edwards' footsteps to the Great Pyramids.

programme.title: Where The Wild Men Are With Ben Fogle
programme.desc: 'S3/E6 - Australia'. Ben hand-rears rescue animals and finds out about the invasive cane-toad when he meets Barbara Walker, a photographer from Switzerland who settled in one of the world's most challenging places.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: 'S7/E11 - Winter Inferno'. Sue transports a new generator. Andy and Denise gather wood. Ricko and his kids hunt for muskrat. Chip and Agnes move camp.

programme.title: Ancient Egypt By Train
programme.desc: 'S1/E3'. Alice takes the train to Luxor to see Tutankhamun's tomb and his mummified body in the Valley of the Kings. She also takes a walk along the Avenue of the Sphinxes.

programme.title: Inside The Factory
programme.desc: 'S6/E3 - Yogurt'. Gregg Wallace visits a factory in rural Somerset that produces one million pots of yogurt every 24 hours.

programme.title: Forces Of Nature
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Motion'. In this episode about motion, find out why a monstrous wave that surges up the Amazon River in Brazil provides insight into the Earth's physical relationship with the Moon.

programme.title: World's Most Scenic Railway Journeys
programme.desc: 'S3/E3 - West Highlands'. The West Highland Line wends its way from Glasgow to the Isle of Skye, taking in Loch Lomond, windswept Rannoch Moor and Corrour - Britain's highest railway station.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: 'S5/E14 - Falkirk Wheel'. In this episode, an impossibly huge project in China to divert water from the wet south to the bone-dry north - the total length is the same distance as New York to Los Angeles.

programme.title: Inside The Factory
programme.desc: 'S6/E4 - Denby (Mugs)'. Gregg Wallace visits the Denby factory in Derbyshire, which has been making pottery since 1809.

programme.title: Super Surgeons
programme.desc: 'S2/E4'. We follow a team of pioneering surgeons and their patients at one of the world's leading cancer hospitals - The Royal Marsden.

programme.title: Where The Wild Men Are With Ben Fogle
programme.desc: 'S9/E3 - Greek Island of Andros'. Ben Fogle ventures to the lesser-known Greek island of Andros to visit Sandy, founder of a remote animal shelter perched on the slopes of the island's highest peak.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: 'S10/E8 - Hard Lessons, Lasting Impressions'. Alaskans break trail and hunt for their survival during the tail end of the brutal winter.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: 'S5/E15 - South North Water Diversion'. A £48bn, 2,400km network designed to divert 44.8bn cubic metres of water in China.

programme.title: World's Most Scenic Railway Journeys
programme.desc: 'S3/E3 - West Highlands'. The West Highland Line wends its way from Glasgow to the Isle of Skye, taking in Loch Lomond, windswept Rannoch Moor and Corrour - Britain's highest railway station.

programme.title: Magnolia Table with Joanna Gaines
programme.desc: 'S7/E5 - Spanish Food And Fun'. Chef Katie Button teaches Joanna how to make some Spanish dishes. They include flamenquines, simple sautéed greens and a brandied pumpkin cheesecake.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: 'S4/E17 - Cleveland'. Classics are on the menu as Andrew reveals Cleveland's iconic foods. Dishes include beer-battered fish, fried sauerkraut balls and a kielbasa sandwich topped with fries.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: 'S4/E18 - Baltimore'. Andrew is in Baltimore, a gritty city where the food is hearty and unique. Dishes include local blue crab, tender pit beef and beloved chocolate Berger cookies.

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: 'S42/E5 - Clambake Stakes'. The chefs set out to make a summer feast in three clambake-themed challenges. They include colourful cocktails, gamey sausage, and a strange starch.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods With Andrew Zimmern
programme.desc: 'S11/E6 - Italy's Amalfi Coast'. Andrew dives into the culinary treasures of the Amalfi Coast. He samples raw red and tucks into Mamma Agata's cloud-like meatballs.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible
programme.desc: 'S15/E8 - A Daughter Finds Her Groove'. Robert Irvine travels to Indiana to help a struggling retro diner which is soon to inherited by the unwell owner's under-prepared daughter.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins, And Dives
programme.desc: 'S33/E1 - Takeout: Worldwide Delivery'. Guy Fieri combines cooking at home with great restaurant food when four series veterans send ingredients and join him via video chat to cook the recipes.

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: 'S52/E9 - Seeking A Sous-Chef: Battle 4'. In this fourth preliminary battle of the sous-chef tournament, the four competitors open the appetiser basket and find a special seafood item.

programme.title: Tournament Of Champions
programme.desc: 'S3/E7 - 8 Warriors Remain'. Guy Fieri welcomes the eight remaining quarter-final chefs to contend with the dreaded randomizer and face off against each other.

programme.title: The Kitchen
programme.desc: 'S27/E7 - Sweet Ways To Celebrate'. The gang shares sweet and special ways to celebrate Valentine's Day! They make sake and miso-marinated salmon with coconut rice, and a yummy brownie tart.

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: 'S42/E6 - Poke Power'. Four chefs face three culinary challenges that include a creative take on poke, a unique piece of pork, and a salty and sweet snack for dessert.

programme.title: Buddy Vs. Duff
programme.desc: 'S3/E7 - Architectural Wonders'. Buddy and Duff face off in an architecture challenge. Buddy travels back to ancient Egypt and Duff looks to his own future with a whimsical treehouse.

programme.title: Buddy Vs. Duff
programme.desc: 'S3/E8 - Monster Matchup'. For the grand finale, Buddy and Duff create monster cakes. Buddy works on a radioactive dinosaur, while Duff makes a Frankenstein's monster cake.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods With Andrew Zimmern
programme.desc: 'S11/E7 - Aztec Routes Of Mexico'. Andrew explores ancient superfoods. He eats wild boar in native cactus and stinkbug salsa before trying sweaty tacos inspired by Aztec ingredients.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins, And Dives
programme.desc: 'S30/E1 - Piling On The Pork'. Guy Fieri digs in and pigs out on all things pork. After sampling a unique take on tacos in San Antonio, he heads to New Orleans to try pork knuckles.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins, And Dives
programme.desc: 'S30/E2 - A World Of Barbecue'. Guy Fieri is exploring an entire world of barbecue. After sampling smokin' chicken salad in Delaware he heads to Kauai for a traditional Hawaiian pig roast.

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: 'S56/E1 - Burger: Impossible'. Four burger-obsessed chefs compete to see who will reign supreme. They create premium beef appetisers, epic lamb burgers and challenging sweet treats.

programme.title: 24 In 24: Last Chef Standing
programme.desc: 'S1/E8 - Shift 8: Elevation'. In the final hours of the competition, the chefs must cook the best dishes of their lives for a chance at $50,000 and an unforgettable trip to Hawaii.

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out
programme.desc: 'S3/E11 - BBQ Burger Meltdown'. Burgermaster Michael Symon serves up Beef and Chorizo stuffed burgers with a side of cast iron-charred broccoli salad with creamy dressing.

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out
programme.desc: 'S3/E12 - Mother's Chops'. Michael Symon honours the women in his life with dishes like grilled lamb chops with rosemary salt and grilled halloumi and watermelon kabobs.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible
programme.desc: 'S16/E1 - Cleaning Up In Mississippi'. In Mississippi, a husband and wife are on the brink of divorce because of their failing restaurant. They call on chef Robert Irvine for help.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins, And Dives
programme.desc: 'S33/E2 - Takeout: Bringing Comfort Home'. Guy Fieri cooks grilled cheese from Nashville, pizza from Boulder, CO, Memphis fried chicken and Greek kebabs out of Houston, TX, all via video chat!

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: 'S52/E13 - Seeking A Sous-Chef: Finale'. Four champions return on a mission to become a sous-chef for a series judge. A stinky fruit and a spicy ice cream feature in the dessert round.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins And Dives: Triple...
programme.desc: 'Diners, Drive-Ins And Dives: Triple D Nation. S4/E9 - Triple D Nation: Mac Meat'. It's a full-blown meat-fest when Guy Fieri checks out meatloaf in Las Vegas. Then, he hits up stuffed street tacos and unique burgers in New Jersey.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins And Dives: Triple...
programme.desc: 'Diners, Drive-Ins And Dives: Triple D Nation. S4/E10 - Triple D Nation: Wrapped Up'. Guy visits a crepe shop in Vegas that serves everything from pork to peaches. Plus, he tries killer carnitas in Santa Barbara, California!

programme.title: Supermarket Stakeout
programme.desc: 'S6/E2 - Judges Takeover Heat No. 2'. Chefs Gabe Bertaccini, Damaris Phillips and Joe Sasto make sloppy sandwiches, slurpy noodles and a sweet dish to earn a spot in the tournament finale.

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: 'S54/E4 - Casino Royale XL: Battle Three'. Four new chefs compete in a preliminary battle. A super-sweet ingredient in the first basket proves to be problematic.

programme.title: Good Eats
programme.desc: 'S16/E1 - Deep Sea Green'. Alton Brown dives into the world of dried seaweeds and why they should be in your pantry.

programme.title: Tournament Of Champions
programme.desc: 'S3/E8 - A Champion Is Crowned'. After epic semi-final battles and one final head-to-head face off, one chef takes home $100,000 in cash and the title of Champion.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins, And Dives
programme.desc: 'S35/E11 - Flavour Expedition'. Guy Fieri's worldwide journey of flavour starts in Caguas, Puerto Rico, with churrasco steak and risotto and ropa vieja dumplings.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins, And Dives
programme.desc: 'S35/E12 - Surf And Savoury'. Guy Fieri grabs a little surf, turf and flavours from the earth. In Puerto Rico, a local gem is serving off-the-hook pork trifongo and shrimp empanadas.

programme.title: Big Bad Budget Battle
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Leftover Lessons'. Host Ree Drummond challenges three home cooks to turn sandwiches into an inviting breakfast and transform dinner leftovers into new supper sensations.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible
programme.desc: 'S17/E4 - Ginger Monkey Is Going Under'. Robert is determined to save the Ginger Monkey in Chandler, Arizona. He is shocked by the restaurant's poor leadership and disgusting food.

programme.title: Magnolia Table with Joanna Gaines
programme.desc: 'S7/E6 - Grandma Zimmern's Meatloaf'. Chef Andrew Zimmern and Joanna trade their gorgeous recipes. Andrew prepares grandma Zimmern's meatloaf and Joanna makes her toffee cake with dates.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Hot Wheels, Big Deals
programme.desc: 'S3/E1 - The Shorty Short VW Bus'. When Richard buys a VW Microbus, can the gang work out its mechanics? Plus, the duo discovers that the Fired Up garage is attending a demolition derby.

programme.title: Iron Resurrection
programme.desc: 'S4/E1 - Truck Yeah'. The Martins face the physics conundrum of trying to fit a 6'5' former football player into the cab of a 1967 Chevy C10. Plus, they customise the interior and exterior.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers
programme.desc: 'S8/E4 - Frogeye Sprite'. Mike attempts to double his money by turning an old Frogeye Sprite into a premiership quality classic car to be test driven around the Brooklands Motor Museum.

programme.title: You Have Been Warned
programme.desc: 'S3/E2 - Speed Freaks'. Featuring a man who drives his car 1,000 feet over water, a shrimp with the fastest punch in the animal kingdom, bionic boots, and a car that jumps over a plane.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Temple Of Doom'. Josh Gates goes to the Cambodian jungle to explore the lost city of the Khmer Empire. He seeks a mystical relic believed to hold the power to incinerate enemies.

programme.title: Car Fix
programme.desc: 'S9/E12'. Lou Santiago and Jared Zimmerman showcase special hands-on projects including modifications, upgrades and repairs using high-end performance and aftermarket products.

programme.title: How Do They Do It?
programme.desc: 'S11/E8'. How do they turn rosebuds into Turkish Delight? How do they hammer out a silver spoon? And, how do they make sunscreen to block out harmful UV light?

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Fastest in America
programme.desc: 'S2/E25 - Texas Vs Black Sheep Part 1'. A windy and dusty night on the streets of Wyoming creates challenging racing conditions for powerhouse teams Texas and Black Sheep Mafia.

programme.title: Savage Builds
programme.desc: 'S1/E8 - Dogfight Derby'. Adam teams up with Lord of the Rings filmmaker, Peter Jackson, to restore a deadly fleet of fighter planes. They stage a high-flying dogfight straight out of WWI.

programme.title: How Do They Do It?
programme.desc: 'S11/E9'. How do they create the world's finest canvases? How do they cook up foul-smelling stinky tofu? And, how do they get fifty drinks out of a single bottle of beer?

programme.desc: 'S8/E5 - Saab 9-3'. Mike wants a high performance car with an historic badge, but it's hard to find a Saab 9-3 Turbo at a good price. With tight margins will Edd have any room for manoeuvre?

programme.title: Voltron: Legendary Defender

programme.desc: Grace is tricked by Solomon into getting married to him, after he deceives her from breaking up with her lover. Now everything is exposed, but she decides to become a Rev. sister.

programme.title: Robots
programme.desc: AI brings together two unlikely people in this romcom. A womaniser and a gold-digger learn humanity when they are forced to team up and pursue robot doubles of themselves.

programme.title: Magic Mike's Last Dance
programme.desc: The franchise concludes with a spellbinding pair of Channing Tatum and Salma Hayek. After a setback, Mike is bartending until he meets a wealthy socialite with a lifetime deal.

programme.title: Mo' Money
programme.desc: Damon and Marlon Wayans turn in hilarious performances in this comedy about a con artist who gets a job in a credit card company.

programme.title: The Wedding Veil Unveiled
programme.desc: The sequel finds Emma in possession of the veil. She travels to Italy, where she meets Paolo. Will the veil work its magic?

programme.title: On The Come Up
programme.desc: A musical drama film adapted from a 2019 novel by Angie Thomas. It follows 16-year-old Bri Jackson as she pursues her dream of becoming a rap sensation.

programme.title: A Christmas Mystery
programme.desc: An epic adventure spurs this heartwarming holiday film. To restore Christmas, a group of courageous kids must track down a lost strip of Santa's magical jingle bells.

programme.title: Yogi Bear
programme.desc: The beloved cartoon character gets his own comedy. When a documentary filmmaker arrives at Jellystone Park to shoot a project, she quickly crosses paths with the infamous Yogi Bear.

programme.title: Scooby-Doo! And Krypto, Too!
programme.desc: Scooby and the gang venture into the realm of superheroes. They team up with Krypto, Superman's dog, when members of the Justice League mysteriously disappear.

programme.title: Tiger's Apprentice
programme.desc: A captivating book-inspired animation. A young boy unexpectedly finds himself apprenticed to a talking tiger after his grandmother's death, and together, they fight evil forces.

programme.title: Superman Returns
programme.desc: Brandon Routh takes on the role of Superman in this 2006 franchise reboot. This time, he takes on the evil mastermind Lex Luthor, played by two-time Oscar winner Kevin Spacey.

programme.title: Lyle, Lyle, Crocodile
programme.desc: Javier Bardem stars in this charming musical comedy based on a children's book series. A family moves into a new house, not realising that the house has a living, singing crocodile.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles:...
programme.desc: 'Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Mutant Mayhem'. Everyone's favourite crime-fighting reptiles return. The turtles work to earn the love of New York while facing down an army of mutants.

programme.title: Dreamgirls
programme.desc: An ensemble cast leads this Academy Award-winning musical drama. Fame and fortune await a trio of talented young women in the early 1960s, but it's not all glitz and glamour.

programme.title: Mafia Mamma
programme.desc: Toni Collette leads this hilarious action comedy. An American suburban mom's life takes a turn when she inherits her late grandfather's mafia empire in Italy.

programme.title: Violent Night
programme.desc: In this holiday action comedy, David Harbour plays Santa Claus, who is not your typical sweet old man. He faces a team of mercenaries when they invade a wealthy family's home.

programme.title: The Passenger
programme.desc: This thrilling drama forces A man to face his fears and confront his troubled past. He must find a way to survive when his co-worker snaps and goes on a violent killing spree.

programme.title: Legend Of La Llorona
programme.desc: A terrifying story about a holiday horror. A couple vacationing in Mexico fights to save their son from La Llorona, the evil spirit blamed for numerous missing children.

programme.title: 3 Days In Malay
programme.desc: A gripping WWII action film inspired by a true story. A group of Marines must defend their airfield in Malay against the Japanese for three days.

programme.title: Black Warrant
programme.desc: Oscar nominee Tom Berenger stars in this action-packed thriller. A semi-retired assassin and DEA agent team up to stop a cyber terrorist organisation.

programme.title: Deadly Ruphoria
programme.desc: An intense crime thriller. A rare night out for a college student turns deadly when the head of a human trafficking ring sets his sights on her.

programme.title: Justice League: Warworld
programme.desc: An action-packed fantasy animation. Transported to a place of unending brutal gladiatorial combat, Batman, Superman and Wonder Woman must form a resistance and lead the planet to freedom.

programme.title: A Small Fortune
programme.desc: A gritty crime thriller. A desperate man living in a small village finds a large stash of money and decides to keep it, but his decision quickly turns deadly.

programme.title: Unknown
programme.desc: Dr Martin Harris awakens after a car accident in Berlin to discover that his wife suddenly doesn't recognise him and another man has assumed his identity.

programme.title: Fatman
programme.desc: Mel Gibson plays a gun-toting Santa Claus in this action film. A broke and down-on-his-luck Santa tries to save his dying business while fighting a ruthless killer for his life.

programme.title: Beast
programme.desc: In this action-packed movie shot in South Africa, Idris Elba fights for his family's survival as a rogue lion hunts a father and his teenage daughters.

programme.title: Ocean's Twelve
programme.desc: In this sequel to the heist drama, the team of talented con artists must repay the money they stole - and what better way to do it than by pulling off yet another daring heist
Adam Driver fights for survival in this action-packed sci-fi thriller. After a catastrophic crash on a mysterious, unknown planet, an astronaut quickly discovers he's not alone.

programme.title: Savage Salvation
programme.desc: Robert De Niro and John Malkovich star in this revenge thriller. A sheriff and a detective strive to maintain peace when a man attacks drug dealers who caused his fiancée's death

programme.title: Wrath Of Man
programme.desc: Guy Ritchie and Jason Statham team up again to deliver this gritty action film. A mysterious and fierce new cash truck security guard has a hidden vengeful agenda.

programme.title: Implanted
programme.desc: An intriguing sci-fi action thriller about a struggling young woman who volunteers for a test AI implant. When the implant takes control of her body, she must fight for her life.

programme.title: Indodakazi Yami
programme.desc: A recently widowed man learns that his daughter is not biologically his when her real father rocks up one day demanding full custody.

programme.title: Maru A Pula
programme.desc: When a disgraced detective searches for a missing girl, he finds a lot more than he bargained for.

programme.title: Sugar Mama
programme.desc: A boy dates a beautiful girl but is insecure as she makes more money than him. He entertains an older lady who gives him money and uses her money to spoil his girlfriend.

programme.title: Ezidla Umzi

programme.title: Makhe

programme.desc: A young woman receives a rude awakening when the will her father left reveals that she can only get her inheritance after she gets married.

programme.desc: 'S1/E22 - The Umpire Strikes Back/Magician: Impossible'. Hailey goes to great lengths to catch a foul ball at a Barnacles game. When a popular magician's tricks are exposed, Hailey must find the perpetrator.

programme.title: Descendants Wicked World
programme.desc: 'S1/E14 - Mad for Tea'. Despite solving multiple dress fiascos, Mal and Evie's good intentions backfire when their help further arises suspicion from the AKs.

programme.title: Disney Saturdays
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Too Many Cooks'. Paris asks if Simone and Ari can work at her parents' baking biz. Cal and Deb reluctantly agree, but before long, Paris is working overtime to clean up her friends' mess.

programme.title: Disney Saturdays
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Why Are You So Meme?'. Paris and Sonia Little, of 2-Cute-4-U, show up at Saturdays in the same hairdo, touching off a 'Who-Wore-It-Best' meme war!

programme.title: Lab Rats: Elite Force
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Holding Out for a Hero'. When Kaz outshines Oliver during superhero training, Oliver resolves to master his new powers. Meanwhile, Bree and Skylar adjust to sisterhood.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Elite Force
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Power Play'. In an effort to win over Skylar, Oliver elicits Chase's help in recovering her powers. Meanwhile, Kaz offers to pet-sit a neighbor's pig, much to Bree's chagrin.

programme.title: Gabby Duran & The Unsittables
programme.desc: 'S2/E38'. When Gabby discovers that her favorite sneakers have been mysteriously destroyed, she will not rest until she finds the shoe killer.

programme.title: Gabby Duran & The Unsittables
programme.desc: 'S2/E39'. When Gabby and Wes' school project gets wiped from Wes' ancient laptop, they go on a wild ride to resurrect it before its due.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And...
programme.desc: 'Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And Cat Noir. S4/E89 - Guiltrip'. When Reflekta locks herself into a bottomless abyss of guilt, Ladybug calls on an ally with unfailing optimism.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And...
programme.desc: 'Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And Cat Noir. S3/E74 - Cat Blanc'. When Marinette makes a serious mistake, she has to face the consequences by fighting the last person she ever imagined would get akumatized.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And...
programme.desc: 'Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And Cat Noir. S3/E75 - Felix'. Students Marinette and Adrien transform into superheroes Ladybug and Cat Noir, to save Paris by capturing evil creatures, Akumas, which transform people into villains.

programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - The Big Wazowskis'. Hoping to get in good with Mike, Tylor signs MIFT up to be Mike's bowling team for the annual Monsters, Inc. Bowl-off-a-thon... only to discover that everyone at MIFT stinks at bowling.

programme.title: Monsters at Work
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - The Damaged Room'. When a human baby's room is damaged by a Jokester, Tylor has his first experience working with MIFT on the repairs. While the room is repaired, Mike and Sulley must take care of a human baby.

programme.title: The Ghost and Molly McGee
programme.desc: 'S2/E38 - The Many Lives of Scratch/Alaka-Sham!'. Scratch's family and friends imagine what his life might have been. Darryl and Scratch run a 'magic' show scheme and are challenged to a magic-off by a rival magician.

programme.title: The Ghost and Molly McGee
programme.desc: 'S2/E39 - F.O.N.A.A.!/Game on'. Scratch uses a curse to take away Molly's fear. When Principal O'Connor makes Darryl join a team sport, Darryl creates his own esports team.

programme.desc: 'S3/E9 - Eqi Gold'. The seven miners are about to reach their tipping point. Even though Saqqaq was a success, Cloud Island was a failure and their faith in Eric's strategy is losing steam.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot
programme.desc: 'S3/E8 - Squatters For Sasquatch'. The team travels to Virginia to investigate a trail camera photo of a possible juvenile Sasquatch. Can Stumpy, their Bigfoot decoy, lure in a lonely Squatch?

programme.title: Codes And Conspiracies

programme.desc: 'S15/E3 - Long Haul Leroy and More'. Don Wildman investigates a mule's win in the Great American Horse Race, a death-defying aerial manoeuvre by a fighter plane and an iconic street car.

programme.title: Building Alaska
programme.desc: 'S3/E7 - The Missing Helicopter'. Lee's crew scramble to correct a mistake after a framing miscalculation at Bulchitna Lake. Derek's crew get in a panic after the helicopter goes missing.

programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - UFO Terror'. A Missouri man who claims UFOs are stalking him contacts Chuck and the team for help. Their investigation uncovers a dark secret which may explain this reported activity.

programme.desc: 'S2/E2 - The Secret Society Skeleton'. Obsession turns to madness for a journalist when she unravels the mystery of a secret society and the skeleton used in its blood rituals.
